subject: A dark-skinned fighter in a gi charging forward with explosive speed and raw physical power
description: A muscular fighter wearing a white martial arts gi with a dark belt lunges forward dynamically. The figure has a shaved head and a determined, fierce expression with teeth bared. Speed lines radiate from behind the figure, suggesting explosive forward motion. The background is bright and washed out by the motion effect. This is a classic Dragon Ball Super card composition emphasizing raw physical burst speed rather than energy projectiles.
foreground: muscular fighter in white gi charging forward at speed, intense expression
background: speed-line burst, white and blue wash
